name: foundry-testing
description: Smart contract testing with Foundry — unit, fuzz, fork, and invariant testing. What to test, what not to test. Pre-deploy test checklist for production contracts.

capabilities.unit_testing: Edge cases, failure modes, economic invariants — not trivial getters
capabilities.fuzz_testing: Random inputs (10K+ runs), bound() over assume(), find bugs you missed
capabilities.fork_testing: Test against real deployed protocols on mainnet fork at specific block
capabilities.invariant_testing: Properties that hold across thousands of random call sequences
capabilities.gas_reporting: forge snapshot for regression detection across versions
capabilities.static_analysis: Slither integration for automated vulnerability scanning

test_priorities: Custom business logic and math operations
Economic edge cases (zero, max uint, self-transfer)
pre_deploy_test_checklist: All custom logic has unit tests with edge cases
Fuzz tests on all math (min 1000 runs)
Fork tests for every external protocol integration
Access control verified — unauthorized calls revert
Gas snapshots taken with forge snapshot
Static analysis: slither . — no unaddressed findings
rules: Fuzz EVERYTHING that does math or handles user input
Fork test EVERYTHING that calls external protocols
Invariant test ALL stateful protocols (vaults, AMMs, lending)
Use bound() instead of vm.assume() — reshape, don't discard
Test unhappy paths more than happy paths
